Why SonoPrep

Built for Serious Students

Every feature designed with one goal: get you to pass the SPI exam on your first attempt.

Spaced Repetition

SM-2 algorithm adapts to your performance, optimizing review timing for maximum retention.

2.3xBetter Retention

Domain-Focused

Every question tagged to ARDMS exam domains. Focus study time where you need it most.

5Core Domains

Performance Analytics

Real-time dashboards track progress, identify weak areas, and predict readiness.

98%Accuracy

Exam Simulation

Timed practice exams mirror the actual ARDMS testing environment.
